BUSINESS GLOSSARY - Enterprise System
Last Updated: 2024-03-15
Status: Partial (pending review)

==========================================
CUSTOMER MANAGEMENT
==========================================

Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts)

Account Holder
The person designated as the primary owner of an account. Similar to Customer bu... [TRUNCATED]

Version: 2.1 (incomplete documentation)
Last Updated: 2024-02-28

triplets.subject: End User
triplets.object: actual user of a product or service

triplets.subject: Order
triplets.object: a request to purchase products or services

triplets.subject: Transaction
triplets.object: Similar to Order but more general

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: an order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation

triplets.subject: Quote
triplets.object: a preliminary order with estimated pricing

triplets.subject: Payment
triplets.object: The transfer of money to settle an order

triplets.subject: Shipment
triplets.object: The process of delivering goods to a customer

triplets.subject: Delivery
triplets.object: The completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer

triplets.subject: Fulfillment
triplets.object: The process of preparing and delivering orders

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unique integer primary key field that identifies a customer record in the customer data table.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Primary Key: customer_id (or is it CustomerID? check with DBA) | | customer_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] | | | customer_id | INTEGER | FK | References customer (which table?) | | Foreign Keys:
- customer_id → CUSTOMERS(customer_id or CustomerID?) | | CustomerID | INTEGER | ? | Possible duplicate of customer_id |

entities_post_resolution.name: Financial Transaction
entities_post_resolution.definition: A financial transaction is the transfer of monetary value (or other value) between parties as part of a business exchange.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Financial Transaction
Any monetary exchange. See Payment, Transaction. | Transaction
Similar to Order but more general. May refer to any exchange of value.

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A unique identifier for an order, stored as the primary key (column named order_id) in the orders data model.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Primary Key: order_id (or OrderID - verify) | | order_id | INTEGER | PK | Unique order identifier | | | OrderID | INTEGER | ? | [possible duplicate] |

entities_post_resolution.name: Delivery
entities_post_resolution.definition: The final step in order fulfillment where goods are handed over to the customer, completing the shipment.
synonyms: The process of delivering goods to a customer
The process of preparing and delivering orders
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Delivery
The completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer. | Shipment
The process of delivering goods to a customer. | Fulfillment
The process of preparing and delivering orders. Encompasses Shipment and Delivery.

entities_post_resolution.name: Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: A physical good or merchandise that is tracked in inventory as a product and offered for sale.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Product
A thing that is... [definition needs clarification] | Item
Synonym for Product. Used in inventory context. | Merchandise
Goods available for sale. Similar to Product. | Inventory Item
Physical products held in stock. May be referenced as Product or Item.

entities_post_resolution.name: Revenue From Selling Products
entities_post_resolution.definition: Total income earned from selling products, i.e., sales revenue.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Sales
Revenue from selling products. See Revenue. | Revenue
Income from sales. The same as... [definition circular, see Sales]

entities_post_resolution.name: Notes
entities_post_resolution.definition: A textual notes field used to capture supplementary information, comments, or remarks about a business entity or record.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | Notes | TEXT | ? | [duplicate?] | | | notes | TEXT | ? | [missing documentation] |

entities_post_resolution.name: Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: A product is a marketable good or service that is offered for sale to customers.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Product
A thing that is... [definition needs clarification] | Item
Synonym for Product. Used in inventory context.

entities_post_resolution.name: Total Amount
entities_post_resolution.definition: The monetary amount representing the tax portion of a transaction.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | total_amount | DECIMAL(12,2) | ? | [duplicate?] | | | TaxAmount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | [duplicate?] | | | tax_amount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | Tax amount |

entities_post_resolution.name: Order With Confirmed
entities_post_resolution.definition: A sales order that has pricing confirmed and inventory allocated for fulfillment, representing a finalized order rather than a preliminary quote.
synonyms: a preliminary order with estimated pricing
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Sales Order
An order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation. Distinct from Quote. | Quote
A preliminary order with estimated pricing, not yet confirmed.

entities_post_resolution.name: Email Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: A database field that stores a user's email address.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | emailAddress | VARCHAR(255) | ? | [possible duplicate] | | | email | VARCHAR(255) | ? | Email address |

entities_post_resolution.name: First Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: Customer's first name (given name) as stored in the customer data model.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | first_name | VARCHAR(50) | ? | [appears to be duplicate] | | | firstName | VARCHAR(50) | ? | Customer's first name | | | lastName | VARCHAR(50) | ? | Customer's last name | | | last_name | VARCHAR(100) | ? | [appears to be duplicate] |

entities_post_resolution.name: Person Or Company
entities_post_resolution.definition: A buyer of goods or services, i.e., a natural person or an organization (company) that purchases from a business.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts) | Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

entities_post_resolution.name: Phone Number
entities_post_resolution.definition: A field representing the contact telephone number used to reach a person or organization.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | phoneNumber | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [possible duplicate] | | | phone | VARCHAR(20) | ? | Contact phone number |

tables_enriched.name: Customers
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about customers, including identifiers, contact details, account status, type, and regional data.

tables_enriched.name: Orders
tables_enriched.description: Stores order records including identifiers, dates, amounts, tax/shipping details, payment status, and notes for each customer order.

tables_enriched.name: Order Items
tables_enriched.description: Stores items that belong to orders, including product references, quantities, pricing, discounts, and line totals for each order item.

tables_enriched.name: Products
tables_enriched.description: Stores product catalog information including identifiers, names, SKUs, categories, pricing, stock levels, activation status, and descriptive details for each product.

tables_enriched.name: Payments
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about payments processed for orders, including identifiers, dates, amounts, methods, statuses, and transaction response details.
